notes: Score 0-100, color coded: green 80+, amber 60-79, red <60. Shows dollar exposure. Action is implicit (icon only). Guidance Engine: prescribe next step per score band.

Highest-value missing action in the product. Table rows show asset, risk level, exposure, replacement cost, probability — no per-row CTA. Each row should have: Replace/Repair, View Coverage, Book Inspection.

Backend has actions[].ctaLabel='Create urgent winterization task'. Score: 85 (<=15F), 75 (<=20F), 60 (<=27F). Frontend shows generic 'View Incident Details' instead of surfacing backend action inline.

9 risk categories (Flooding, Hurricanes, Wildfires, Heat, Tornadoes, Earthquakes, Winter, Drought, Sea Level). Rich analysis with no deep links. Guidance Engine: map mitigation steps to Coverage Intelligence, Seasonal Checklist, Negotiation Shield.
Shows risk delta, projected cost, incident likelihood. After simulation output, no 'Now act on this' CTA. Guidance Engine should surface actionable next step based on simulation results.
MAX_SUGGESTIONS=5, ranked by urgency+confidence+cost. suggestedInputPayload in backend response. Missing: Replace/Repair tool integration before jumping to replacement scenario.

screen: Risk Assessment Detail (not surfaced in frontend)
notes: Well-structured backend model (status: RECOMMENDED/PLANNED/IN_PROGRESS/COMPLETED, priority: LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL). Not surfaced in any frontend component found. High Guidance Engine value.

currentActionLabel: Edit | Complete | Mark as Not Needed
notes: Red (overdue), orange (due soon), green (scheduled). Missing context-specific 'Book Service' for professional tasks vs DIY tasks.
Daily 2 AM generation, 9 AM notification. Climate region + home profile driven. No 'Book Contractor' CTA for complex seasonal tasks (gutter cleaning, HVAC tune-up).
Confidence scores: 0.95 (OCR/AI), 0.60 (manual), 0.85 (verified), 0.50 (unverified). Confidence score not surfaced in UI.
Only renders when health < 70 AND pending actions > 0. Well-targeted. Could show specific category of failing tasks.
Saturdays 3:30 AM. Dedup prevents duplicate ACTIVE/SNOOZED. No escalation when habit repeatedly snoozed.

currentActionLabel: Manage Appliance Warranties / Book Service / View Inspection
notes: Backend has reasons[].actionHref. HVAC/Roof/Water Heater sends user directly to booking without Replace/Repair or Price Radar intermediate step. Premature booking gap.
Blue box with Shield icon. Appliance warranty → warranties page. HVAC/Roof/Water Heater → booking (premature). Should route through Replace/Repair first.
Backend: actions[].ctaLabel='Create renewal task'. Score: 75 (<=3d), 60 (<=7d), 40 (<=14d). Frontend doesn't surface specific action inline.
No 'Compare Rates' or 'Find Better Policy' CTA on expiring policy. Guidance Engine: surface Coverage Intelligence or Risk Premium Optimizer when renewal approaches.
Verdict: ADEQUATE / HAS_GAPS / CRITICAL_GAPS. CRITICAL_GAPS verdict should escalate to stronger action than 'View details'.
Shows savings range and top recommendation. After recommendations, no 'Contact insurer', 'Negotiate', or 'Implement mitigation' CTA.
Three item preview. Generic 'View All' — no inline 'Renew Now' or 'Compare Options' per item.
Backend tracks overdueFollowUps and nextFollowUpAt. Guidance Engine: surface follow-up reminders proactively.

5 scenario types: BUYER_INSPECTION, CONTRACTOR_QUOTE, CONTRACTOR_URGENCY, INSURANCE_CLAIM_SETTLEMENT, INSURANCE_PREMIUM. Rich AI output has no clickable next step. Should convert to counter-offer templates, claim reopening, or contractor shortlist.
No signal for warranty GAP (item with no warranty coverage). Coverage Intelligence fills this but is not cross-linked.

currentActionLabel: Resolve Recall | View Details | Contact Manufacturer
notes: CRITICAL (death/fatal), HIGH (fire/burn/electrocution), MEDIUM (shock/choking). No 'Find Replacement' or 'Book Installation' CTA post-resolution.
Score <50 should surface Home Savings, Refinance Radar, Energy Audit. Celebration modal at >=60 on first load.

screen: Dashboard Tool Card, Home Savings Tool Page
notes: actionUrl field in DB but not consistently surfaced per opportunity. Confidence: HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW. Status: NEW/VIEWED/SAVED/APPLIED/SWITCHED/EXPIRED.

screen: Dashboard Tool Card, Refinance Radar Tool Page
notes: FRED/Freddie Mac data Thursday 5PM. After viewing opportunity, no 'Contact Lender' or 'Get Rate Quote' CTA. Tracks missed opportunities and rate trends.

signalLabel: Hidden Asset Match — Tax / Rebate / Warranty Gap
notes: Sundays 3AM. Status: DETECTED→CONFIRMED→EXPIRED/INACTIVATED. No push notification when new DETECTED match found.
paybackMonths computed per recommendation but no booking/upgrade CTA attached. Categories: HVAC, Water Heating, Lighting, Appliances, Insulation, Solar, Behavioral.

12 signal codes: 7 NEGATIVE, 4 POSITIVE, 1 MIXED. Threshold: impact_score >= 40. No action. Map: FLOOD_RISK_PRESSURE → Coverage Intelligence, TRANSIT_UPSIDE_PRESENT → Sell/Hold/Rent, ZONING_RISK → Renovation Advisor.

screen: Dashboard Main, Health Score Detail Page
notes: Grade: A=EXCELLENT, B=STRONG, C=STABLE, D=MODERATE_RISK, F=HIGH_RISK. Below 70 triggers MaintenanceNudgeCard. Action is implicit icon only.
Status: AVAILABLE / EXPIRED / REVOKED. Expiry should trigger prominent notification.
Week-over-week delta displayed but no action when score drops significantly. Guidance Engine: 'Score dropped 10pts — here's why + what to do'.

Most significant backend→frontend action gap. actions[].ctaLabel exists in backend response but frontend shows generic 'View Incident Details'. 6 source types, 5 status states, suppression + snooze support. AUTO_ACTIVATE_MIN_CONFIDENCE=45.

cta.reason (COVERED/MISSING_DATA/ACTION_REQUIRED/NONE) present in backend but not surfaced to user. Suppression reasons: BOOKING_EXISTS, COVERED, NOT_ACTIONABLE, CHECKLIST_TRACKED, USER_MARKED_COMPLETE.
15 event types. Daily notification for significant events. No actionable CTA on notification or tool page.
23 HomeEventType values. sourceBadge field (USER_REPORTED/DATA_VERIFIED/AI_DETECTED/THIRD_PARTY/ESTIMATE). Generic 'View Details' CTA.

Risk levels: CRITICAL, HIGH, MODERATE, LOW. Tax thresholds: >$300/mo=HIGH, >$700/mo=CRITICAL. Structural types: ROOM_ADDITION, ADU_CONSTRUCTION, BASEMENT_FINISHING, etc. Convert text to checklist tasks.
EOL condition should route to Replace/Repair tool before booking. Condition: EXCELLENT/GOOD/FAIR/POOR/EOL/UNKNOWN.
Simple daily roll-up. No prioritization of which pending issue is most urgent.

screen: Home Gazette Tool Page, Dashboard Card
notes: Mondays 6AM. Aggregates all signal families into weekly digest. Stories have deep links to relevant tools. Good Guidance Engine output surface.
